response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced senior developer with a strong background in full-stack development, but his seniority and focus on advanced topics (e.g., AI agents, high-performance systems) may exceed the requirements for this junior/mid-level role. However, his TypeScript, React, and PostgreSQL experience aligns well with the job, and his open-source contributions demonstrate initiative and passion for clean architecture.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript and React experience, including modern tooling and best practices.
Proven track record of building scalable, pragmatic solutions across the stack (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz).
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, indicating a passion for learning and collaboration.
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role; may seek more senior responsibilities or higher compensation.
Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or AWS services (nice-to-haves), though his broader experience compensates partially.
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his current hybrid/remote-friendly senior roles.
